role.description: Platform role of the user in the app

base_role.description: Granular app role preset that pre-fills the permission checklist

permissions.description: JSON object map of permission key -> true for every section/page/function this user can access

linked_buyer_id.description: For buyer-role users: the id of the Buyer record their portal is scoped to

linked_supplier_id.description: For supplier-role users: the id of the Supplier record their portal is scoped to

timezone.description: User's preferred timezone (IANA name), set from the Profile settings page
